---
title: "American Society of Microbiology – Texas Medical Center Chapter"
description: "Connecting microbiologists across the Texas Medical Center"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-banner">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1 class="hero-title">ASM-TMC Chapter</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Advancing the Microbiological Sciences in the Texas Medical Center</p>
    <a href="about.html" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg me-2">Learn About Us</a>
    <a href="events/index.html" class="btn btn-outline-light btn-lg">Upcoming Events</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Our Mission

The **American Society of Microbiology – Texas Medical Center (ASM-TMC) Chapter** brings together students, postdoctoral researchers, faculty, and industry professionals working in the microbiological sciences across the greater Houston / TMC area.

Our chapter is dedicated to:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="feature-card text-center">
### 🔬 Scientific Excellence
Hosting seminars, symposia, and workshops that highlight cutting-edge research in microbiology, infectious disease, and related fields.
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="feature-card text-center">
### 🤝 Community Building
Fostering a supportive network that connects early-career scientists with mentors, collaborators, and career opportunities throughout the TMC.
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="feature-card text-center">
### 🎓 Career Development
Providing professional-development resources—grant writing, science communication, career panels—to help members thrive at every stage of their careers.
</div>
:::

:::

---

## Upcoming Events

Stay tuned for our next seminar, networking mixer, and annual symposium. Visit the [Events page](events/index.qmd) for the full calendar.

::: {.callout-note}
## Next Event
**Spring Symposium 2025** — *Frontiers in Infectious Disease*  
🗓 Date: TBD | 📍 Location: Texas Medical Center, Houston, TX  
Registration details will be announced on this page and via our mailing list.
:::

---

## Why Join ASM-TMC?

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
- 🌐 Access to a **national network** of 30,000+ ASM members worldwide
- 📅 Invitations to **exclusive chapter events** — seminars, socials, workshops
- 💼 **Career resources** including job boards and mentorship programs
- 📰 Discounted access to **ASM journals** and publications
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
- 🏆 Eligibility for **ASM grants and awards** for students and postdocs
- 🗣️ Opportunities to **present your research** at chapter and national meetings
- 🤝 **Volunteer leadership** roles to build your CV and expand your network
- 📧 Chapter **newsletter** with local news and opportunities
:::

:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Ready to Get Involved?
Membership in the ASM-TMC Chapter is open to anyone interested in the microbiological sciences. Join today at [asm.org/membership](https://asm.org/membership) and connect with us via our mailing list.
:::

---

## About the Texas Medical Center

The [Texas Medical Center](https://www.tmc.edu/) is the largest medical complex in the world, home to 60+ institutions including research universities, hospitals, and biotech companies. The TMC is a hub for infectious disease, translational, and basic science research — making it an ideal home for a vibrant ASM chapter.

---

## Connect With Us

Have questions or want to get involved? Visit the [About page](about.qmd) to meet our leadership team and learn how to reach us.

---

## Social Media

Follow us to stay up to date with ASM-TMC news, events, and announcements.

```{=html}
<div class="social-feeds-grid">
  <!-- X (Twitter) real-time timeline -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i>
      <span>@asm_tmc on X</span>
    </div>
    <div class="twitter-feed-wrapper">
      <a class="twitter-timeline"
         data-height="450"
         data-theme="light"
         data-chrome="noheader nofooter noborders transparent"
         href="https://x.com/asm_tmc">
        Posts by @asm_tmc
      </a>
      <script async src="https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Instagram follow card -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-instagram"></i>
      <span>@asm_tmc on Instagram</span>
    </div>
    <div class="social-follow-wrapper">
      <p class="social-feed-desc">
        Follow us on Instagram for behind-the-scenes photos, event highlights, and microbiology content from the Texas Medical Center community.
      </p>
      <a href="https://instagram.com/asm_tmc"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="btn btn-instagram">
        <i class="bi bi-instagram me-2"></i>Follow @asm_tmc
      </a>
      <hr class="social-divider">
      <p class="social-feed-note">
        <i class="bi bi-bell me-1"></i>
        Turn on post notifications so you never miss an event announcement or research spotlight.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Facebook follow card -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-facebook"></i>
      <span>ASM-TMC on Facebook</span>
    </div>
    <div class="social-follow-wrapper">
      <p class="social-feed-desc">
        Like our Facebook page to stay informed about chapter events, announcements, and news from the broader ASM community.
      </p>
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/asm.tmc.chapter"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="btn btn-facebook">
        <i class="bi bi-facebook me-2"></i>Like our Page
      </a>
      <hr class="social-divider">
      <p class="social-feed-note">
        <i class="bi bi-bell me-1"></i>
        Turn on notifications so you never miss an event announcement.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- LinkedIn follow card -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
      <span>ASM-TMC on LinkedIn</span>
    </div>
    <div class="social-follow-wrapper">
      <p class="social-feed-desc">
        Follow our LinkedIn page for professional updates, career opportunities, and networking with microbiologists across the Texas Medical Center.
      </p>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/asm-tmc"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="btn btn-linkedin">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin me-2"></i>Follow on LinkedIn
      </a>
      <hr class="social-divider">
      <p class="social-feed-note">
        <i class="bi bi-briefcase me-1"></i>
        Connect with fellow microbiologists and discover new career opportunities.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
